Description: Opening day session reviewing school mission, strategic plan progress, and 2024-25 priorities. Staff engaged in gallery walk of student achievement data and set team goals.
Follow_Up_Action: Grade-level teams develop SMART goals by Aug 19

Description: Deep dive into updated ELA scope and sequence. Teachers mapped units to state standards and identified cross-grade vertical alignment opportunities.
Follow_Up_Action: Teachers submit unit plans for Q1 by Aug 23

Description: Math curriculum alignment session focused on new supplementary materials adopted for grades 6-8. Problem-solving routine protocols introduced.
Follow_Up_Action: Implement weekly problem-solving routines starting Sept

Description: Annual refresher on restorative practices framework. New staff received foundational training while returning staff explored advanced circle facilitation techniques.
Follow_Up_Action: Each teacher facilitates one community circle by Sept 15

Description: Training on new adaptive learning platforms (DreamBox and Lexia) plus updates to Google Classroom features for the new school year.
Follow_Up_Action: Complete platform setup for all classes by Aug 30

Description: First data meeting of the year using MAP Fall assessment results. Teachers analyzed class and student-level data to form flexible groups.
Follow_Up_Action: Flexible grouping plans submitted to coaches by Sept 16

Description: Review of updated IEP documentation requirements and timeline compliance. Introduction of new progress monitoring tools.
Follow_Up_Action: IEP timeline audit completed by Oct 1

Description: First session of four-part series on culturally responsive pedagogy. Focus on self-reflection and understanding cultural identity in the classroom.
Follow_Up_Action: Complete cultural autobiography assignment by Oct 21

Description: Workshop on high-leverage formative assessment techniques including exit tickets, strategic questioning, and student self-assessment protocols.
Follow_Up_Action: Implement two new formative strategies and bring student work to Nov meeting

Description: Best practices for parent-teacher conferences with focus on strengths-based communication and goal-setting with families.
Follow_Up_Action: Conference materials prepared by Oct 28

Description: Second session focusing on culturally responsive curriculum design. Teachers audited one unit for representation and multiple perspectives.
Follow_Up_Action: Revised unit plan with CRT lens due Nov 25

Description: Mid-year review of intervention effectiveness. Analyzed progress monitoring data and adjusted groupings. Introduced new phonics intervention for K-2.
Follow_Up_Action: Updated intervention groups effective Dec 2

Description: Mid-year review of SEL curriculum implementation. Shared Panorama survey results and discussed classroom-level SEL strategies.
Follow_Up_Action: Administer student SEL check-in surveys by Dec 13

Description: Debrief from fall emergency drills including lockdown, fire, and severe weather. Identified areas for improvement in communication protocols.
Follow_Up_Action: Updated emergency binder by Jan 6

Description: Comprehensive mid-year data review including MAP Winter results, attendance data, behavior data, and SEL survey results. Schools set adjusted goals.
Follow_Up_Action: Adjusted SMART goals due Jan 13

Description: Third session focusing on creating inclusive classroom environments. Teachers practiced strategies for facilitating difficult conversations about race and identity.
Follow_Up_Action: Implement one new inclusive practice and journal about it for 4 weeks

Description: Advanced differentiation strategies for math instruction. Focus on parallel tasks, open-middle problems, and tiered assignments.
Follow_Up_Action: Try parallel tasks in at least one unit and bring student work to March meeting

Description: Training on recognizing and responding to trauma in school settings. Specific strategies for creating predictable, safe classroom environments.
Follow_Up_Action: Review classroom routines through trauma-informed lens

Description: Workshop on embedding meaningful writing tasks across all content areas in middle grades. Shared exemplar writing assignments and rubrics.
Follow_Up_Action: Implement one cross-curricular writing assignment by March 21

Description: Final session. Teachers presented culturally responsive unit redesigns. Peer feedback protocol used. Discussion of sustaining CRT practices long-term.
Follow_Up_Action: Complete CRT self-assessment by March 24

Description: Third data cycle meeting using formative assessment data and progress monitoring. Focus on students not yet meeting growth targets.
Follow_Up_Action: Targeted tutoring plans for identified students by March 24

Description: Collaborative session on co-teaching models and inclusive practices. SpEd and gen ed teacher pairs shared successful strategies.
Follow_Up_Action: Co-teaching pair check-ins scheduled for April

Description: Preparation for MCA state assessments. Review of testing protocols, accommodations, and strategies for reducing student test anxiety.
Follow_Up_Action: Testing schedules and accommodation plans finalized by April 21

Description: Planning session for annual PBL Showcase. Teachers finalized project timelines, rubrics, and community presentation logistics.
Follow_Up_Action: PBL projects launched in all classrooms by May 5

Description: Comprehensive end-of-year data review. Teachers reflected on goal progress and began identifying summer PD priorities for 2025-26.
Follow_Up_Action: Individual PD reflection forms due May 19

Description: End-of-year celebration and recognition. Preview of summer work including curriculum writing teams and facility improvements. Staff appreciation.
Follow_Up_Action: Volunteer for summer curriculum teams by May 23
